variants.title: Donaldson P525184 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58760
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P525184 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2433 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 58760
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2433 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 58760. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2433 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
